_comment: Higgsfield persona config. Place this file in: social_media/<Influencer_Name>/higgsfield.json
_soul_id_note: Set to true after running 'higgsfield soul train' with ~20 face reference photos
_reference_note: Place your AI persona's base face image in the same folder as this config
_earn_note: Set to true after verifying Instagram/YouTube on higgsfield.ai/earn

generation_preferences._model_note: nano_banana_pro is cheapest. kling_3 is premium but costs more credits.

earn_campaigns._note: List active campaign names from higgsfield.ai/earn that this persona will target
